name: Quick N' Easy Dill Sauce
directions: Whisk together all ingredients.
Use immediately or refrigerate.

similar.name: My Secret Dill Sauce for Fish and Seafood

name: Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
Will keep indefinitely if stored in the refrigerator.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum

name: Solo No Nonsence Barbecue Sauce
directions: Mix, heat, and stir.

name: Pour over 'no Cook' Barbecue Sauce
directions: Whisk together all ingredients.
Use immediately or cover and refrigerate until needed.

name: Cajun Remoulade Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Cover and refrigerate up to 3 days.
Use on fried fish, french fries-- use your imagination!

name: Mustard Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a sauce pan and mix well.
Bring to a simmer, and continue to simmer for 30 minutes, stirring often.

name: Texas BBQ Sauce (Low Fat)
directions: Combine all in a saucepan and heat until boiling.
Pour over any meat you choose and broil, fry or simmer!

name: BBQ Sauce (Low Fat)
directions: Combine all in a saucepan and heat until boiling.
Pour over any meat you choose and broil, fry or simmer!

name: Bourbon Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a deep frying pan (Dutch oven?), melt the butter and gently fry the onions, chilies and garlic for about 5 minutes.
Lower the heat and add all the other ingredients, except the Bourbon, stirring after each addition.
Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring frequently, then add the Bourbon and cook for another 3-5 minutes.
Let the sauce cool, stir now and then.
Put in clean jars or wide neck bottles and label.
Store in a cool dark place.

name: Simple Salsa
directions: Seed the bell peppers, tomatoes and chile pepper.
Dice the bell peppers and tomatoes and put in a bowl.
Finely chop the chile and add to bowl.
Chop onion finely and add to bowl.
Mince garlic and add.
Add cumin and garlic.
Then add lemon juice and mix.

name: Chinese Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Combine cornstarch and water.
Set aside.
In saucepan heat all remaining ingredients until sugar is dissolved and liquid is hot.
Slowly add the cornstarch and water mixture, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens, about 1 minute.
Remove from heat.
Serve warm or room temperature.

name: Fluffy Horseradish Sauce
directions: Mix ingredients; cover and chill several hours.

name: Easy BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients& mix very well.
Store in refrigerator.

name: Sour Cream Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Pour over your favorite vegetables or baked potatoes.

name: Simple Avocado-Mango Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve with grilled meats or with tortilla chips.

name: Remoulade Sauce
directions: Process all ingredients in the food processor fitted with a steel blade until vegetables are finely chopped.
Season with salt and pepper; chill until ready to use.

name: Dill Sauce
directions: Mix mayonnaise, dill and lemon juice well.
Refrigerate at least one hour for blending of flavors.
Serve on fish.

similar.name: My Secret Dill Sauce for Fish and Seafood

name: Bill's Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium.
Add onion and celery and saute 5 minutes or until tender.
Add paprika, garlic and cayenne.
Saute 1 minute more.
Add ketchup, beer, vinegar and Worcestershire sauce.
Simmer, uncovered, on medium-low until slightly reduced and flavors have blended, about 30 minutes.
This can be prepared in advance and refrigerated or frozen.

name: Cranberry Orange Sauce
directions: Combine sugar, zests, juices& next 5 ingredients in a heavy pot.
Cook until sugar dissolves, stirring constantly.
Bring to aboil& let boil for about 3 minutes.
Fold in the fresh cranberries& liqueur.
Simmer, stirring occasionally until most of the cranberries break open (about 15 minutes).
Remove from heat& let the mixture cool.
Spoon into sterilized jars, cover tightly& refrigerate.
This will keep for up to one month.

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
If using as a sauce in a dish you are cooking, just stir and add to pan a few minutes before service.
Then cook over med-high heat stirring constantly until sauce thickens and takes on a'glazed' appearance (1- 2 minutes).
If using as a dipping sauce, combine ingredients in a small saucepan and cook over medium heat stirring constantly until sauce boils.
Boil and stir 1 minute.
Keep warm for dipping.

name: Coffee BBQ/ Grilling Sauce
directions: Mix mustard powder with 1 tbsp of water to make mustard mixture.
In a saucepan, prepare the barbecue sauce by combining ketchup, brown sugar, espresso, cider vinegar, onion, jalapenos, garlic, molasses, mustard mixture, Worcestershire, cumin and cayenne pepper.
Bring to a boil on medium heat and cook for 10 minutes.
Let cool and use as a marinade and grilling sauce on poultry.

name: Honey Dill Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix together.
Let stand 30 minutes or more to allow flavours to blend.

similar.name: My Secret Dill Sauce for Fish and Seafood

name: Teriyaki Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all together.
Enjoy.

name: Applesauce
directions: Put the apples and water in a saucepan.
Cover and bring to the boil.
Boil over low heat, stirring occasionally, 20 minutes.
Stir in sugar and cook until it dissolves.
Add cinnamon or nutmeg.
Serve warm or cold.

name: Creamy Horseradish Sauce
directions: Whip the cream, add mayo& combine.
Drain horseradish in a strainer.
I push down with my knuckles to remove excess liquid.
Add to cream/mayo mixture& stir well.
Stir in worstershire& season to taste with salt.
For an added kick, add a couple of drops of hot sauce.

name: Easy Horseradish Mustard Sauce
directions: Drain horseradish in a strainer.
I push down with my knuckles to remove excess liquid.
Combine with remaining ingredients& mix well.

name: Honeydew Melon Salsa
directions: Combine melon, pineapple,chile and onion; whisk oil, garlic, vinegar, lemon juice and honey; pour over fruit mixture and add salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately or chill.
Use within 24 hours.

similar.name: Eileen's Fruit Salsa for Fish or Chicken

name: Pineapple Stuff (Salsa I guess)
directions: Peel, core and chop the pineapple into small pieces.
Mix with the remaining ingredients and chill in a non-reactive bowl for a few hours before serving.

similar.name: Eileen's Fruit Salsa for Fish or Chicken

name: Blueberry Sauce
directions: Combine blueberries, maple syrup and lemon juice in a medium saucepan and cook gently over low heat, mashing blueberries slightly, until reduced and slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Stir in basil.
Serve warm.

name: Barbecue Salad Dressing
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small mixing bowl; mix well.
Cover and chill.
Serve over salad.

name: Easy Stir Fry Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large glass jar with a lid.
Screw lid on.
Shake well.
Can store in fridge up to 2 weeks.
Shake well before using.
To use sauce: stir fry your vegetables and meat as desired, add appropriate amount of sauce, bring to a boil, boil for 1 minute or until slightly thickened.
Serve.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Garlic Cream Sauce for Chicken/Seafood/Pasta
directions: Melt margarine on stovetop and add garlic.
Saute 1 minute.
Add flour and stir another minute.
Add chicken broth and cook stirring until sauce thickens.
Stir in sour cream.
Serve over chicken, seafood, pasta or a mixture.

name: Heather's Stir-Fry Sauce
directions: Whisk all ingredients together until smooth.
Add to stir fry just at the end, stirring well into the dish and let sauce come to a bubble.
Let simmer until sauce has thickened, then serve.

name: Blueberry Salsa
directions: Section pink grapefruit and discard membrane.
Dice grapefruit and mix with remaining ingredients.
Mix well and refrigerate for at least an hour before serving.

name: Hot & Spicy Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix the cornstarch with a bit of water& stir.
Mix all the ingredients in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil, stir constantly, until it has thickened, about 10 minutes.
Cool slightly before serving.

name: Diabetic Bar-b-q Sauce
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a small saucepan.
Bring to a boil.
Cover and simmer 15 to 20 minutes on low heat.
Best if allowed to sit in the refrigerator overnight.
Can be used immediately after preparing.

similar.name: Lexington Barbecue Dip  (A La Craig Claiborne)

name: Strawberry Honey Sauce
directions: Warm the honey in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring until thin but not hot.
Remove from heat and add lemon juice and strawberries.
Stir until blended, cover and let stand at room temeperature until ready to serve.
Note: The sauce will keep covered in the fridge for 2 to 3 days.
Allow to reach room temperature before serving.

name: Everything Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients.
let sit in your refrigerator for 2 hours.

name: Dianne's Cranberry Sauce
directions: Wash cranberries and set aside.
Bring sugar and water to a boil.
Add cranberries, oranges and cloves.
Simmer over a high flame, stirring frequently, until berries pop open.
Add crushed pineapple, walnuts and cinnamon, and blend.
Cool and serve.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: My Secret Dill Sauce for Fish and Seafood
directions: Combine mayonnaise with dill pickle and green onions.
Stir in dill weed, celery salt, Worcestershire sauce and lemon juice.
Cover and refrigerate at least 3 to 4 hours for flavors to blend.
Preparation time does not include chill time.

name: Sexy Barbecue Sauce
directions: Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat.
Add garlic and sauté for a minute or two, until garlic is softened and aromatic, you can skip the mincing and go for garlic powder if you want to, but that is just a cheater's way out.
Add water and turn heat up to medium.
Swirl mixture or stir until integrated fairly well.
Add Chili sauce, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, chili flakes, and whatever other spices that turn you on.
Stir to combine.
Heat over medium or medium-high heat until sauce is thick and bubbly.
Serve over grilled chicken, veggies, etc.
Note: if using for a marinade, allow to cool completely first.

name: So Simple Salsa
directions: Turn on a food processor and drop the garlic into the moving blade.
Process until finely chopped.
Add the cilantro and pulse to chop fine.
Squeeze the juice from the lime half into the blender.
Add the tomatoes and pulse 2 or 3 times for chunky salsa or blend until smooth, about 15 seconds.
Serve at once or refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Poor Mans Barbecue Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
let stand for approximately 15 minutes or longer.

name: Chinese Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix together all the sauce ingredients in a bowl and stir well until combined.
Cover and chill in the refrigerator, to allow the flavors to infuse, for at least 1 hour prior to serving.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum

name: Salsa Verde
directions: Peel papery skins from tomatillos, and wash them and the jalapenos.
Boil tomatillos and jalapenos for 5 minutes and drain.
Put all the ingredients in a blender and blend for a few seconds to mix.
Chill and serve.

similar.name: Avocado and Tomato Salsa (Great With Fish or Chicken)
Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa

name: Spicy Peanut Sauce for Noodles, Veggies And/or Meat
directions: Combine all ingredients except scallions in a bowl, using the back of a large spoon to blend into a smooth paste.
Use sauce to dress noodles, vegetables and/or meat.
Sprinkle scallions over top.
This recipe makes 1 cup of sauce, enough to dress 1/2 lb.
of noodles.
Use 1-2 T per 1/2 c vegetables.
I usually use this sauce over 1 lb sliced grilled chicken breast, steamed carrots, snowpeas, red bell pepper and fresh bean sprouts.

name: Tex Mex Cranberry Salsa Ii
directions: Combine water and sugar in medium saucepan.
Bring to a boil over med heat.
Add cranberries; return to boil.
Gently boil cranberries for 10 minutes without stirring.
Pour into medium glass mixing bowl.
Gently stir in remaining ingredients.  Place a piece of plastic wrap directly on salsa.
Cool at room temperature and refrigerate.

name: Bbq Sauce With a Kick
directions: In medium-sized saucepan, heat butter over medium-low heat. Add onion and saute for 5 minutes, but do not allow them to brown.
Stir in ketchup, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, vinegar. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Divide into jars, cool and freeze or refrigerate for 2 to 3 weeks.

name: Very Berry Salsa
directions: Rinse the berries and than let dry on paper towels. Discard any berries that are not edible, hull the strawberries, and than slice strawberries in quarters.

In a large bowl, combine blueberries, strawberries, sugar, onion, vinegar, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Mix well and place in refrigerator for at least one hour. Before serving, stir in the almonds. Serve over fruit sorbet, poultry, or pork.

name: Sweet and Hot Garlic Sauce
directions: In a saucepan, comine the sugar, water, vinegar, garlic and salt.
Bring to a boil over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
Turn to medium-low and keep cooking until the sauce is a little syrupy (18-25 min).
Remove from heat and add the chili sauce--mix well; it will turn a nice amber-orange.
Let cool to room temperature, then keep refrigerate in an airtight jar for up to three weeks.
When using, heat a little bit until it thins to a slightly syrupy consistency.

name: Barbecue Sauce / Mop - American Style Tomato Based
directions: NOTE OF CAUTION: This sauce, while cooking, will "bubble and burp". Do not cover completely, but a spatter screen or a lid partially closed is a good idea. Whenever cooking anything that has this much sugar in it BE CAREFUL!
Sweat all ingredients in step 1 IN A NON -ALUMINUM POT until clear, do not brown.Use more garlic if you like or roast the garlic and onions first.
Add remaining ingredients and simmer on low until it is as thick as you like it. This could take any where form 1 to 2 hours.
Do not skim. When using stir first to incorporate butter back into the sauce. That's where a lot of the flavor is.

NOTE: Sri Racha Chili Sauce is a thick Thai style chili sauce available in most markets around the world now. If you can not find it use Tabasco BUT DO NOT USE AS MUCH. TABASCO IS A LOT MORE SOUR than Sri Racha Sauce is. If you like it spicy-hot just add jalapenos or chilis while it is cooking but keep in mind that it cooks and reduces for quite a while and it will get very spicy if you use a lot of peppers.
After cooking let cool and store in any non-reactive container (no aluminium). Keep it refrigerated and it will last "forever". Only take out what you need and return the rest to the frig.

name: Super Gulf Coast Cocktail Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a small bowl. Taste. If it tastes off (I say this cause I dont really measure, just put things in till they taste good) then may need to add a touch more lemon or wostershire. If you like really spicy, a little bit more horseradish. If too watery looking may need to add some more ketchup.
Enjoy!

name: Cantonese Sauce
directions: Heat 1 T oil in saute pan add first three ingredients and cook just until garlic and ginger are fragrant.
Add next five ingredients cook till sauce thickens and is clear.
Add to sauce the sesame oil and seeds use as desired.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Honey Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Stir well and bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 15 minutes.

name: Garlic Sauce
directions: Mix the sour cream with the mayonnaise. Add some of the water if you want a thinner sauce.
Add the dried herbs and garlic powder to taste (I prefer LOTS of garlic).
Let it sit in the fridge for a little while, so the dried herbs can soak up the liquids.
Add more water if needed.

name: Get Grillin' Beef or Pork Barbecue Sauce for Ribs
directions: Put all ingredients in medium small pot on stove.
Heat over medium heat until butter melts and sauce just start to bubble.
Reduce heat and simmer over low heat 10-15 minutes, uncovered.
Use on beef or pork ribs on the grill -- just put on the last 5 minutes, so the sauce does not burn on the ribs -- just let caramelize nicely and enjoy!

name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce
directions: Use good quality mayo, mustard and soy sauce.
Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.  Refrigerate.

similar.name: Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Best Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a sauce pan melt butter.  Add onion & saute until tender.
Add remaining ingredients and heat 2 to 3 minutes or until sugar dissolves.

name: Simple Barbecue Sauce
directions: Heat oil; saute garlic.
Add remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
Simmer for 15 minutes.

name: Cinnamon-Blueberry Sauce
directions: Drain the blueberries, reserving 1/4 cup juice.
Combine sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon in a small saucepan.  Stir in reserved blueberry juice and lemon juice;  blend well.
Bring to a boil over medium heat;  reduce heat to low, and simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in blueberries.
Serve warm.

name: Raspberry Syrup
directions: Mix cornstarch, sugar, lemon juice, rind and cold water to make a smooth paste.
Stir strained raspberries into paste gradually until smooth.
Heat in saucepan until mixture boils and thickens.
Stir constantly.
Remove from heat.
Add 1 Tbsp butter if desired.
Serve warm.

name: Maple-Apple BBQ Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients except maple flavor. Bring to a boil while stirring with a whisk. Continue to cook for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the maple flavor.
Use immediately or store in refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

name: Cranberry Sauce
directions: In a saucepan, add sugar to water, boil, and stir until sugar is dissolved.
Add berries.
Simmer until berries split.
Add zest.
Stir slightly.
Remove from heat, let thicken a few minutes, then refrigerate.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Cooking Light Spicy Peanut Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
Stir well with a wire whisk.

name: Cranberry-Apple Ginger Sauce
directions: In a 4 or 5-quart saucepan, bring ALL ingredients to a boil over medium heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
Boil the sauce (lower temperature if the sauce is spitting too much) stirring occasionally (about 10-15 minutes) or until thickened.
Cool and refrigerate for a minimum of 3 hours before serving.

name: The Best  Barbecue Sauce Ever
directions: Place all ingredients in to a sauce pan.
Bring to a rolling boil.
Then enjoy on your favorite meats.

*** Adobo Seasoning is made by Goya Brands and comes in many flavors --  Is is found in the spice isle or the international food isle at your local supermarket -- My preference is the one with the red top.

name: Cranberry-Cherry Relish
directions: In a large heavy saucepan combine all the ingredients and bring to a  simmer over medium-high heat. Stir often to prevent sticking.
When mixture is simmering, reduce heat to low. Cook mixture until fruit is tender and the relish has thickened, approximately 40-50 minutes, stirring occasionally. Let cool, serve.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves
Sarasota's Sweet and Savory Cranberry Relish

name: Delicious Cranberry-Pineapple Sauce
directions: Drain the pineapple thoroughly in a fine sieve set over a large measuring cup (push the pineapple against the sieve to drain out any extra juice).
Add enough water to the measuring cup (with the juice in it) to make 2 cups liquid.
Place the liquid in a saucepan.
Add in cranberries and sugar.
Stir over medium heat until sugar dissolves and the mixture comes to a boil.

Continue to boil until most of the berries pop (you might want to keep a splatter screen or a lid over until the berries are finished popping) and the mixture is thick, stirring occasionally (about 10 minutes) remove from heat.
Add in drained pineapple, walnuts, lemon juice and cloves; mix until well combined.
Transfer to a bowl and cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
Delicious!

name: Cranberry Relish
directions: Mix all ingredients in saucepan and bring to boil over med. heat stirring constantly.
Cover, reduce heat and simmer for 15 minute stirring occasionally.
Cool and enjoy!

similar.name: Sarasota's Sweet and Savory Cranberry Relish

name: Mango Salsa
directions: Peel and chop coarsely one mango.  Peel and smash up until a bit runny the other mango.
Mix together with finely chopped red onion coriander (cilantro) and lime juice.
Simple but sensational.  Serve with fish or poppadums.

similar.name: Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa

name: Root Beer Barbecue Sauce
directions: If you are adding in onion and garlic, then saute first in a couple tablespoons oil in a heavy saucepan for about 5 minutes until soft.
Add in the remaining ingredients, except salt and pepper; bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for about 25-30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cool to room temperature, cover then chill overnight or tightly covered for up to 2 weeks.

name: Spicy Cranberry Relish
directions: Combine all ingredients in a medium bowl.
Chill at least 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Sarasota's Sweet and Savory Cranberry Relish

name: Chicken Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Use for chicken, pork, beef, or vegetables.

name: Homemade Salsa
directions: Cut stems off of the cilantro bunch, and discard stems.  Combine all ingredients in a food processor and blend until desired consistency.  Place in serving bowl and enjoy.  Good if served chilled.
(If not hot enough blend in 1 habenero for extra spice).

similar.name: Olive Salsa - if You Love Tangy...

name: Honey-Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Stir ingredients together.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Quick Cheat for Chili's Sweet Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Delicious Double Cranberry-Orange Sauce
directions: In a heavy saucepan combine cranberry juice concentrate and sugar; bring to a boil over high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Add in the fresh and dried cranberries; cook until the dried berries begin to soften and the fresh berries begin to pop, stirring often (about 7 minutes).
Remove from heat and stir in the orange marmalade, orange juice and allspice; cool completely, cover and refrigerate until cold (about 2 hours).

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Cinnamon Syrup
directions: Combine sugar, water, corn syrup and cinnamon; stir constantly until it reaches a boil.
Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and let stand until warm, NOT HOT.  Stir in milk.  Serve warm.

name: Sweet & Salty Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients in a large jar with a tight fitting lid.
Close jar and shake thoroughly.
Serve immediately or store in refrigerator for up to a week.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum
Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Citrus Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients except crackers.
Serve immediately with the crackers. Or cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

similar.name: Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa

name: Eileen's Fruit Salsa for Fish or Chicken
directions: Put all into a bowl except oil and lemon.
Add the 1/2-1 Fresh lime or lemon juice squeezed over all.
Add approximately 1-2 TBL of olive oil.
Let flavors meld for at least 1 hour. You can refrigerate or not.
Enjoy.
Eileen Baker.

name: BBQ Sauce With Homemade Liquid Smoke
directions: Sauté onion in oil until soft. Add remaining ingredients. Bring mixture to a boil and then simmer for 40 minutes.  Until sauce reaches thickness of molasses.

name: Barbecue Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
DO NOT BOIL.

name: Smokin' Sweet Bar-B-Que Sauce
directions: Whisk to combine all ingredients in a sauce pan over high heat.
Once sauce comes to a boil, reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30-45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
If sauce is too thick thin with a little vinegar.
Yeah, its that easy. Enjoy!

name: Easy No-Cook Smokey Basting Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a bowl combine all the ingredients; whisk until well blended adjusting the liquid smoke seasoning and cayenne pepper to taste.
Brush on meat towards the end of cooking,.

similar.name: BBQ Sauce With Homemade Liquid Smoke

name: Peanut Dipping Sauce With a Kick
directions: Whisk peanut butter and hot water together in a medium bowl.
Stir in remaining ingredients and use as a dipping sauce or on noodles!

name: Spicy Cucumber Melon Relish
directions: In medium bowl, combine sugar, lime juice, cilantro, red pepper flakes, salt and pepper.  Stir until sugar dissolves.  Just before serving, stir in remaining ingredients and toss gently to combine.

name: Homemade Steak Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Shake well.

name: Spiced Apple and Raisin Sauce
directions: In medium skillet, cook apple over medium low heat in butter until tender; stir in brown sugar, raisins, cinnamon and cloves.
In small bowl, combine remaining ingredients; blend well then stir into apple mixture, stirring constantly.
Serve warm alongside poultry or over ice cream.

name: Blueberry Sauce
directions: In a saucepan over medium heat, combine the berries, 1/4 cup water, orange juice and sugar; bring to a boil stirring gently.
In a small cup or bowl mix the cornstarch with 1/4 cup cold water until combined; add to the simmering mixture; gently stir (careful not to mash the blueberries).
Simmer on low heat until thick enough to coat the back of a metal spoon (about 3-4 minutes).
Remove from heat and stir in the almond extract and cinnamon.
Thin the sauce with a bit of water if it is too thick for your liking.

name: Blue Mountain Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a medium nonreactive saucepan, combine all ingredients. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally until slightly thickened - 5 to 10 minutes.
Let cool before using as a marinade.
Store in a covered container in the fridge for up to three months. (Yeah, right - like it'll last that long!).

name: Easy Cream Sauce
directions: In a large pan, melt all of the butter.
Add the cream cheese and the chicken broth.
While stirring the sauce, bring sauce to a boil for a minute.
Don't burn the sauce!
Simmer for 2-5 more minutes.
Serve atop any meal; it's delicious!

name: So Easy Blackberry Sauce
directions: Put the cranberry sauce and the blackberries in the pan.
Heat, stirring until the cranberry sauce melts or dissolves or whatever you want to call it.
Stir in the sugar.
Bring the sauce and berries to a boil.
Mix the water and flour in a cup and pour into the sauce.
It will thicken really quick.
Stir, take it off the stove.
Serve hot or warm, on waffles or pancakes or ice cream or pork.

name: Balsamic BBQ Sauce
directions: Slowly cook onions on medium low heat, in oil, until they caramelize, about 20-25 minutes.
Add tomatoes, paste, vinegar and cook 15 minutes.
Add brown sugar and cook until a thick consistency is reached.
Add Worcestershire sauce and salt and pepper.  Taste and adjust to your liking. You may add Tabasco too if you like an added kick!
Enjoy!

name: Garlic Mayonnaise
directions: Place vinegar, egg, pressed garlic and mustard in a food-processor bowl.
With the machine running, slowly pour the oil in a steady stream through the top.
Although it defies logic, the more oil you add, the thicker the mayo becomes.
Season with salt and pepper.

name: BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix the taco seasoning, sweet and sour sauce, honey and cummin together in a bowl.
In a sauce pan, simmer the vinegar, onion and garlic until reduced by half. Add the lemon juice and let cool.
strain the vinegar and use it to loosen the sauce until it is the consistency that you like your BBQ sauce.

name: Lemon Sauce
directions: Finely slice chilies.
Put dried ingredients in a pot and mix together well, add honey, chillies and sauce if using and then slowly add water (or fresh stock) and mix well together.
Put on stove over a medium heat and stir continuously until thick.

name: Zippy Peppered Cranberry Relish
directions: Regular powdery pepper makes it really hot and too peppery.
**Do not attempt to crack or grind the pepper yourself**.
Combine all of the above in a food processor and pulse until it is the consistency of chunky salsa (probably will have to be done in 2 batches).
Blend together in a bowl, cover and refrigerate overnight or for 2 nights.
If you serve too soon it will be way too peppery.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Sarasota's Sweet and Savory Cranberry Relish

name: Cocktail Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.

name: Seafood Cocktail Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.
Serve with cold shrimps or other seafood.

name: Cream Cheese Sauce
directions: Melt together cream cheese and butter in a saucepan over low heat until smooth and creamy, about 10 minutes. Stir in milk and garlic.
Simmer over low heat, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
Serve over pasta or chicken.

name: Alabama White Barbecue BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together and refrigerate for 8 hours for best result (you can use it pretty quickly however in a pinch).  Brush lightly or marinate over chicken, turkey or pork.  If brushing lightly do last few minutes of grilling.  Can be used as a dipping sauce as well.
This amount easily covers 6 pieces of chicken so you can adjust accordingly if you are marinating or just brushing it on.

similar.name: Big Bob Gibson's Alabama White BBQ Sauce

name: Cocktail Sauce, the Emeril Way
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except salt and pepper.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Store in glass jar in refrigerator up to one week.

name: Outrageous Ham Steak Sauce
directions: Cook sauce uncovered for 15 minutes,.
Marinate ham steak's in sauce for 1/2 hour or longer, grill, broil, or fry ham steak basting with the sauce as needed.

name: East Meets West Barbecue Sauce
directions: Ready for this? Ok. Here we go!
Get a shaker or a container you can lid and shake. Put all the ingredients in and shake thoroughly.
Put your feet up - your work is done!

name: Pineapple Sweet and Sour Stir Fry Sauce
directions: Mix cornflour and juice from pineapple.
Mix all other ingredients except vegetables.
If using as a stir fry sauce, cook your meat and then add mixed sauces.
Stir through to coat meat.
Add cornflour and pineapple mix, stirring continually. Allow sauce to boil.
Add vegetables and pineapple, stir fry for about 30 seconds and serve with rice.
This sauce can also be used as a dipping sauce, or for pouring over deep fried battered chicken, fish or meat.
Simply pour the mixed sauces into a pan. Bring to boil.
Add the cornflour and pineapple mix, stirring continually. Allow to boil.
Add vegetables and pineapple.
Serve poured over you favourite meat, or use as a dipping sauce for finger foods.

name: Pineapple Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Let sit 10-15 minutes for flavors to  blend.
Can be made in advance and stored in the refrigerator 2-3 days.

name: Thai Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine sugar water and vinegar in a small saucepan.  Bring to a boil and boil for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat.  Stir in garlic, fish sauce and chili sauce.  Simmer for 2 minutes.
Remove from heat.  Cool and add lime juice and shredded carrot.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum

name: Anna's Spicy Salsa
directions: In a blender combine chopped onion and jalepenos to make a corse paste.
Peel and quarter tomatoes.  Place in a bowl in microwave for 1 minute  Then add to onions & jalepenos, but do not blend.
Add sugar, cumin, garlic salt and black pepper. (Amounts of these can be adjusted to your own taste and heat preference).
Puree for 5-10 seconds.
Place in refrigerator until chilled.  Serve with your favorite corn chips.

name: Root Beer BBQ Sauce
directions: Reduce the root beer to 1 cup over medium heat in a large saucepan -- this takes about one hour.
Add the Apple Cider Vinegar, ketchup, Yellow Mustard, lemon juice,  Worcestershire Sauce, Tabasco, salt and pepper.
Stir well and simmer for twenty minutes.
Finish the sauce by whisking in the cold butter for extra body and flavor.

name: Low Sodium Soy Sauce Substitute
directions: In small saucepan, combine all ingredients.
Bring to boil and boil gently, uncovered for
about 5 minutes or till liquid has been reduced to about 1/2 cup.
Store in refrigerator in glass container.
Shake well before using.
Makes 1/2 cup sauce.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Honey Mustard Dressing/Dip for One
directions: Mix the above ingredients and voila!

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce
Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves
directions: Bring juice to simmer in heavy, large saucepan.
Remove from heat.
Add cherries and let stand 8 minutes.
Mix in sugar, then cranberries, cloves, and nutmeg.
Cook over medium-high heat until cranberries burst, stirring occasionally, about 9 minutes.
Refrigerate at least 4 hours (it will thicken as it cools) or up to 48 hours before serving.

name: Cheese Sauce
directions: Melt butter over low heat
Add flour and mix to a paste.
Stir in mayonnaise, mixing thoroughly.
Add boullion.
Continue stirring over medium heat until mixture boils and thickens.
Remove from heat.
Add in milk and cheese; Stir well.
Serve hot over your favorite vegetables.

name: Shrimp Cocktail Sauce
directions: Mix all of the ingredients.
Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.

name: Worcestershire Sauce
directions: Place all ingredients in a medium saucepan and stir thoroughly.
Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Simmer 1 minute.
Cool.
Store in the refrigerator.

name: Pineapple Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Drain both cans of pineapple over a bowl.
Add/whisk in cornstarch until smooth and combined (no need to measure out the juice) set aside.
In a small saucepan heat oil over medium-low heat; add in garlic and a small pinch cayenne pepper; stir for 2 minutes.
Add in ketchup, brown sugar, vinegar and soy sauce; cook stirring until simmering.
Add in the juice/cornstarch mixture; bring to a boil, stirring or whisking constantly until thickened.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
Mix in the pineapple tidbits.
Season with black pepper to taste if desired.

similar.name: Pineapple Sweet and Sour Stir Fry Sauce

name: Coffee Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan and simmer for 5 minutes.
Baste onto your meat while it's on the grill.
Refrigerate extra sauce.

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Mix together water, sugar, vinegar, ketchup, and soy sauce.
Mix cornstarch and water together and add to sauce.
Bring to boil, stirring constantly.

name: Corn and Black Bean Salsa
directions: Mix together and chill!
Serve with Tortilla Chips.

name: Rhonda's Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients in sauce pan.
Cook on medium heat for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.

name: Dickeydoo BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all but last 2 infredients.
Simmer and stir often for 30 minutes.
Add soy sauce and butter.
Stir until butter is melted.
Use as described in the description above.
Store refrigerated.

similar.name: Lexington Barbecue Dip  (A La Craig Claiborne)

name: Marianne's Salsa/Dip
directions: Mix together and put in fridge for at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Horseradish Sauce (Ww)
directions: In a medium bowl (I use a 2 cup pyrex measuring cup), whisk everything together.
Let sit in fridge to allow flavours to blend.
Stir in parsley just before serving.
Keeps in the fridge for days.

name: Cheese Sauce
directions: Microwave butter for 30 seconds.
Stir in flour and microwave for 1 minute.
Gradually stir in milk and spices.
Microwave on high for 3 min or until thick.
stirring every minute.
Stir in cheeses.

name: Fiery Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan; cook over medium heat until sugar dissolves, stirring occasionally.
Use as basting sauce for pork chops or chicken.
Microwave directions: Combine all ingredients in a 1-quart glass bowl.
Cover with heavy duty plastic wrap and microwave at HIGH 4 to 5 minutes or until mixture is thoroughly heated, stirring once.

name: Signe's Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Adjust garlic salt, salt, and pepper to taste.
Allow to chill at least 20 minutes.

similar.name: Olive Salsa - if You Love Tangy...

name: Honeycup Mustard Sauce
directions: Place the mustard in a small mixing bowl and whisk in the vinegar, soy sauce, ginger, and garlic.
Set the sauce aside, or cover and refrigerate it for up to a month.

name: Horsey Cocktail Sauce
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Chill.
Great with Shrimp, Oysters, Crackers, ETC.

similar.name: Cocktail Sauce That Will Make People Wonder Why It's Sooo Good!!

name: Mango Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients except chips and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
Serve with Tostitos Scoops.

name: Pineapple Salsa
directions: Assemble ingredients.  Serve immediately or let the salsa rest and come together for a few minutes to an hour or longer.  Serve with chicken, pork or just about anything!

name: Easy Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan combine all ingredients.  Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
Baste grilled meats with the sauce and serve extra sauce on the side.

name: Big Bob Gibson's Alabama White BBQ Sauce
directions: Place all ingredients in a very large blender or food processor. (It may be necessary to do this in 2 batches; just add 1/2 of each ingredient and then repeat.).
Blend for 1 minute, or until thoroughly combined and mixture is smooth.
Pour sauce into a large bowl.
Use when grilling chicken; brush lightly over the chicken during the last few minutes of grilling.
This sauce is also great for dipping; set some sauce aside for passing at the table.
Enjoy!

name: Tex-Mex Salsa Roja
directions: Place chiles in skillet and add enough oil to cover, about 1 cup. Heat skillet over medium-high and cook peppers until dark red, about 5-10 minutes. Set pan aside to cool.
Remove husks from the tomatillos and place in pot of water, bring to a boil and cook until they turn lighter green, about 20 minutes. Drain and cool.
Place peppers, oil and tomatillos in a blender or food processor and process until smooth. Add salt to taste.

name: Tex-Mex Salsa With Tomatoes
directions: Grill or broil jalapeños until skin is dark green and blistering and you can peel them easily, about 5-10 minutes. Cool peppers, peel and remove seeds.
Grill or broil tomatoes about 5-10 minutes until you can peel skin.
Place peppers and tomatoes in blender and process just until chunky. Pour into bowl; add onion and cilantro, mix well. Add salt to taste.

name: Blueberry Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients in a medium heavy saucepan.
Bring to a boil.  Turn down heat to simmer.  Simmer until thickened.  About 15 minutes.  Sauce will continue to thicken as it cools.

name: Lexington Barbecue Dip  (A La Craig Claiborne)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small sauce pan and bring to a simmer.
Cook, stirring, until the sugar dissolves.
Remove from the heat and let stand until cool.
Spoon a small amount of the sauce over barbecued meats and poultry.

name: Homemade Barbecue Sauce
directions: Place first 8 ingredients in a medium sauce pan.
Cut 1 thick slice of Lemon and 1 thick slice of Onion and add to the pan.
Simmer first 10 ingredients uncovered for 20 minutes.
Add last 3 ingredients.
Bring to a boil.
Cool.
Store in refrigerator.

name: Pork Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a heavy skillet, cook bacon.
When it begins to give off fat, add onion and scallions, and cook until onion is transparent.
Stir in vinegar, sugars, and catsup.
Bring to a boil, lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in chili sauce, Worcestershire, Tabasco and cumin and simmer 10 minutes longer.

name: Hot Horseradish Cream Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan, melt butter and stir in flour.
Add milk a little at a time, stirring well after each addition to prevent lumps.
Add more milk if sauce is too thick, continue cooking if sauce is too thin.
Add mustard and salt and pepper to taste.
Pour hot over vegetables.

name: Caribbean Fruity Salsa
directions: Toss together the mango, pineapple, papaya, jalapeno pepper, and red onion in a bowl.
Pour in the lime juice and olive oil. Season to taste with salt, and stir to combine.
Sprinkle with chopped mint leaves before serving.

similar.name: Eileen's Fruit Salsa for Fish or Chicken

name: Instant Cheese Sauce II
directions: Stir cheddar cheese soup until smooth.
Blend soup with milk.
Season as desired with prepared mustard.
Heat, stirring often.

name: Honey Mustard Dressing or Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients thoroughly and refrigerate.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce
Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Alabama White BBQ Sauce #2
directions: Mix ingredients together and refrigerate for at least 8 hours before using.
Brush lightly over chicken, turkey or pork during the last few minutes of grilling.
This barbecue sauce is also great as a dipping sauce so set some aside before you start grilling to serve on the table.

similar.name: Big Bob Gibson's Alabama White BBQ Sauce

name: Peach and Ginger Salsa
directions: Combine all ingredients and mix gently.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa

name: Mango Salsa Ole'
directions: Dice mango, red onion, bell pepper and jalapeno pepper.
Place in serving bowl.
Stir in remaining ingredients and chill until serving.
NOTE:  Some may want to add 2 jalapenos rather than 1 for a more fiery taste.

name: Simple Steak Sauce
directions: stir all ingredients and serve.

name: Simple Seafood Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a 2 quart saucepan, heat the oil and butter on medium.
Add the garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Add the chicken broth, chili sauce. seafood seasoning, worcestershire sauce and Tabasco sauce to taste, if using.
Stir well and reduce the heat to medium high.
Bring to a boil.
Boil and stir occasionally for 5-7 minutes to reduce by one third and thicken.
Remove sauce from heat and use.
Or cool and refrigerate , covered for up to 1 week.
The sauce can also be frozen in small portions in freezer weight plastic containers for up to 3 months.
Defrost in refrigerator and use within 3 days.
To use the sauce:.
Brush on shrimp or seafood kabobs during the last few minutes while grilling over medium heat, until the seafood is done to personal preference.
Additional sauce can be passed for dipping at the table.

name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum
directions: Mix all ingredients to combine and serve.

similar.name: Soy Dipping Sauce (For Pot Stickers or Egg Rolls)

name: Cheese Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small saucepan.
Cook on low heat, stirring occasionally until well combined and done, about 5 to 8 minutes.

name: My Mom's Cocktail Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill.

name: Pineapple-Apricot Salsa
directions: Toss all ingredients in small bowl to blend.
Season with salt and pepper.
(Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.).

similar.name: Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa

name: Barbecue Sauce
directions: Add all ingredients except ketchup, liquid smoke and Worcestershire sauce in a small pan.
Simmer for 20 minutes.
Add ketchup, liquid smoke and Worcestershire sauce.
Bring to a boil; set aside to cool.

name: Ranch Dressing from Scratch
directions: Get out a medium sized bowl.
Measure the mayonnaise into it.
Gradually whisk in the buttermilk or yogurt.
If you use powdered buttermilk, whisk in the powder first, and then slowly add a cup of water.
Then add the seasonings.  Whisk again.
Or you can make it in the blender by putting everything into the blender and whirling until smooth.
The mixture will be a little thin, but it will thicken on standing. Store in a pint size jar, makes 2-cups.

Keep in the refrigerator for a few weeks. Tastes really good with yogurt by the way.  This is my favorite way of making it.  It tastes good with powdered buttermilk too, but the consistency is thinner than with yogurt.
Note:  If desired, you may add a tablespoon of Parmesan Cheese and/or a tablespoon of lemon juice to the dressing in addition to the seasonings above.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce

name: Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)
directions: Wisk together all ingredients.  Refrigerate before serving.  Store in refrigerator.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce

name: Soy Ginger Sauce
directions: In small bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well.
Serve at room temperature.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Fresh & Healthy Mango and Cucumber Salsa
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Refrigerate for up to 30 minutes, if time allows. This will marry the flavors!

name: Throw-Together BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients in a saucepan and simmer over low heat while mixing.
Simmer on low heat for 5 minutes.
Bring to room temperature and put in jar(s) 'til needed.

name: Fresh Cranberry Salsa
directions: Place onion and jalapeno in a food processor, process until chopped.
Add all remaining ingredients, pulse 8-10 times or until cranberries are coarsely chopped, stopping to stir once or twice.
Store in airtight container overnight to allow flavors to blend.

name: Creole Mustard Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.
Cover and chill.

name: Japanese Sesame Dipping Sauce
directions: Put all ingredients in a bowl, and stir well.

similar.name: Soy Dipping Sauce (For Pot Stickers or Egg Rolls)
Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum

name: Japanese Ginger Dipping Sauce
directions: Put all ingredients in a bowl, and stir well.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Spicy Cocktail Sauce
directions: In a serving bowl, mix all the ingredients. Put it in the refridgerator for later use or serve with your meal.

similar.name: Cocktail Sauce That Will Make People Wonder Why It's Sooo Good!!

name: Tavern Barbecue Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large cooking pot.
Bring to a simmer and allow to cook at a very low boil for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
Can be refrigerated until ready for use.

name: Sweet and Simple Meatloaf Sauce
directions: Stir all ingredients together.
If you plan to serve some at the table, set it aside before you baste the raw meatloaf.
Baste meatloaf before and during cook time.

name: Sue's Citrus Salsa
directions: Reserve 1/4 cup of the combined citrus juices, from cutting citrus.
Combine all ingredients, except reserved citrus juices.
Mix citrus juices with honey.
Pour over salsa, and mix gently.
Cover, and refrigerate.

name: Cheesy Mustard Sauce
directions: Melt the butter in a medium-size saucepot. Add flour, cook 1-2 minutes over moderate heat, then whisk in the chicken stock and mustard.
When the stock comes to a bubble and starts to thicken, stir in the cheese with a wooden spoon.
Remove from the heat and serve.

name: Honey-Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Stir all ingredients in a small bowl.
Serve at room temperature.
This sauce will keep, covered and refrigerated, for up to 1 month.

similar.name: Quick Cheat for Chili's Sweet Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Sour Cream  & Horseradish Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together, chill for 30 minutes so flavors blend.
Great with grilled steak, ham or even potato puffs.

name: Grape Honey Barbecue Sauce
directions: Put all of your ingredients together in a pan and heat well, it will be a dark color.
Once it just boils take it off and let it cool.
Use it or jar it, it will keep for 2 weeks in the fridge tightly closed.

name: Basic Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a saucepan, heat oil and cook onion until tender.
Stir in garlic and cook for about 1 minute.
Stir in remaining ingredients. Reduce heat to a slow simmer and cook until reduced by half or desired thickness, stirring occasionally. Season with salt and black pepper if desired.

name: Super Simple Salsa
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until desired consistancy.
(You can add cilantro, red pepper flakes or even a small can of green chiles).

name: Green Salsa
directions: Place the tomatillos, jalapenos (if you want it hotter, add a whole cup, if you want it less hot just put in 1/2 a cup), cilantro, onion, garlic, salt & pepper and jalapeno brine  in a blender.
Process on a lower speed until the tomatillos, onion & cilantro are broken down, and then process on a high speed until all the ingredients are broken down into a puree.
The sauce should pour fairly easily. If it seems too thick, add more jalapeno brine until it is the consistency you desire.
Taste and add more salt and pepper if you desire.
Will keep in the fridge for a week.

name: Jack 'n Coke Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients in heavy-bottomed saucepan and bring to just boiling.
Reduce heat to simmer and cook for 20 minutes.
Remove from heat, cool, and refrigerate in container until needed.

name: Olive Salsa - if You Love Tangy...
directions: Preparation:
Combine all ingredients.
Yield.
Makes 2 cups.
Serve with tortilla chips.

similar.name: Avocado and Tomato Salsa (Great With Fish or Chicken)

name: Zesty Cocktail Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in mixing bowl. Cover and chill until ready to use.

similar.name: Cocktail Sauce That Will Make People Wonder Why It's Sooo Good!!

name: Sweet Hot Mustard
directions: Mix dry mustard and vinegar and let stand overnight in a closed container. I use a glass mason jar and lid.
The next day, in a glass saucepan beat egg; mix in sugar, salt and mustard mixture; cook over low heat, stirring constantly with wire whisk, until mixture thickens and just begins to bubble.
Take off heat. Let cool approximately 30 minutes; then stir in miracle whip.
Keep in a sealed container in the refrigerator.
Will keep in the refrigerator for up to two months.
Notes: This mustard is perfect with ham. Great sandwich spread. It also works well as a dip for sausage or pepperoni sticks at a party.

name: Perfect Cranberry Sauce
directions: Place all the ingredients in a pan and cook until the liquids have reduced to a thick cranberry sauce.
Once the berries have burst, which should be after about ten minutes, it should be ready.
Taste to test whether the sauce needs more sugar (if you find it too sweet just add some lemon juice).

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Copycat Neely's BBQ Sauce
directions: In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat to simmer.
Cooked uncovered, stirring frequently, for 2 hours.

name: Kansas City Style Barbecue Sauce
directions: In medium dutch oven, heat oil over medium high heat till shimmery (but not smoking).  Add onion and garlic and cook till soft, about 5 minutes.
Add stock, root beer, vinegar, corn syrup, molasses, tomato paste, ketchup, mustard, hot sauce, and 1/4 teaspoons liquid smoke.  Stir with a whisk till well combined.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium and simmer till mixture has thickened and reduced to about 4 cups, about an hour.  Remove from heat and stir in remaining liquid smoke.
Sauce will keep about a week in the refrigerator, or up to four months if frozen.

name: Kicked up Cocktail Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together and whisk well to combine.

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: In a small pot dissolve the corn starch with part of the water until it doesn't have any clumps.
Put the rest of the water and the other ingredients together, mix well and heat the pan on a medium heat.
Keep mixing it until the color changes from brown to red.
Enjoy it!

name: Quick Cheat for Chili's Sweet Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients in a small bowl.
Add to your own taste.

similar.name: Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Sauce for Chicken and Ribs
directions: Whisk all ingredients together and baste over chicken or ribs during grilling.

similar.name: Get Grillin' Beef or Pork Barbecue Sauce for Ribs

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Mix first 6 ingredients in saucepan and simmer over low heat.
Right before serving, mix the cornstarch and water.
Bring sauce to a boil and stirring constantly, pour in cornstarch mixture.
Boil for 2 minutes.
May add a few drops of red food coloring for that chinese restaurant red color.

name: Black Bean & Corn Salsa Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients and let marinate for at least 30 minutes.  Serve with tortilla chips or eat all by itself.

name: Creamy Garlic Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan melt butter, add garlic and saute until cooked.
Add the flour and then whisk milk inches.
Add the dried oregano and dried basil and stir until heated through.
Serve warm.

name: My Favorite Texas BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients except butter/drippings in medium sauce pan. Simmer over very low heat stirring occasionally for 1 hour.
Stir in butter/drippings and simmer an additional 15 minute
Serve warm or cold.
Store in air tight container in refrigerator up to 2 weeks.

name: Cranberry Syrup
directions: In medium saucepan, mix all ingredients, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Over medium-high heat, bring to rolling boil, then reduce heat to medium & boil 30-40 minutes or until reduced to about 2 1/2 cups.
IF YOU DO NOT WANT THE BERRIES IN THE SYRUP (I prefer leaving them in!), pour syrup through mesh strainer & discard cranberries!
Store syrup covered in glass container in refrigerator no longer than 7 days!

name: All Purpose BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Cook over low for approximately 30 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Black Gold Balsamic Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a small saucepan and stir until all the ingredients are incorporated and the mixture is smooth.
Simmer over medium heat until reduced by 1/3, about 15 to 20 minutes.

name: Cocktail Sauce Variation 1
directions: Mix ingredients in a bowl.

similar.name: Cocktail Sauce That Will Make People Wonder Why It's Sooo Good!!

name: Thai Peanut Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.

name: Onion Garlic Dip
directions: Cook onion and garlic on medium heat for 1 minute in olive oil in a Saute pan. Add onion and garlic mixture to large bowl and add mayo, sour cream, parsley, pepper, and salt. Eat.

name: Soy Dipping Sauce (For Pot Stickers or Egg Rolls)
directions: Whisk all ingredients together.  Top with green onion slices as a garnish.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum

name: Creamy Garlic Dressing
directions: mix all ingredients in blender.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce

name: Spicy Chili Aioli
directions: Combine mayonnaise, and lemon juice with a wire whisk, mixing together until uniform.
Add pressed garlic and chili paste and continue to mix once again until uniform in texture.
Serve aioli in a small ramekin, bowl, or directly on top of food and garnish with a sprinkle of cayenne pepper. Serve cool to slightly below room temperature.

name: Neely's BBQ Sauce
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine all ingredients.
Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat to simmer.
Cook uncovered, stirring frequently, for 1 hour 15 minutes.

name: Spicy Vegetable Dipping Sauce
directions: Whisk together mayonnaise, chili sauce, lime juice, cilantro, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a small bowl; season with pepper.
Refrigerate in an airtight container up to 1 week.

similar.name: Peanut Dipping Sauce With a Kick

name: Sweet & Spicy Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: Wisk together ingredients in a bowl, making sure sugar is completely disolved.

name: Garlic-Dill Mayonnaise
directions: Combine all ingredients in small bowl; mix well.
Cover; refrigerate for 1 hour to blend flavors.

name: Chinese Dipping Sauce
directions: Simmer ingredients over medium heat for 5 minutes, remove from heat and set aside.
Sprinkle with chopped green onion.

similar.name: Easy Asian Dipping Sauce for Dim Sum
Soy Dipping Sauce (For Pot Stickers or Egg Rolls)

name: Salt Free Peanut Satay Sauce
directions: Put all of the ingredients except the coconut milk in a blender or food processor and blend until smooth and creamy.
Transfer to a bowl and stir in the coconut milk.  Keep sauce refrigerated if you are not going to use it right away.

name: Honey Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients. Bring to a boil. I sometimes let this sit a day as the flavor gets better with age. Serve with chicken or pork.

name: Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce Blend
directions: In a small bowl combine the honey, mustard and barbeque sauce.
Mix well, cover bowl and chill until serving.
TIP: Bump up the mustard for a more tart tasting if it is on the sweet side for you. with 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice!

similar.name: Quick Cheat for Chili's Sweet Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
Super Easy Honey Mustard Sauce (Or Salad Dressing)

name: Easy Cheese Sauce
directions: Stir milk gradually into corn starch in a small saucepan until smooth.
Add butter, salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly; boil 1 minute; remove from heat.
Stir in cheese until melted.
Serve over broccoli, cauliflower, asparagus or baked potatoes.

name: Curry Mayonnaise
directions: Combine all ingredients together.
Let sit at room temperature for about 30 minutes before serving.

name: Thai Peanut Sauce
directions: In a medium microwaveable bowl, stir together all ingredients except vegetable broth. Slowly stir in broth.
*Microwave on High 1-1/2 minutes or until boiling, stirring several times. Serve hot or at room temperature.
Yield: about 1 -1/3 cups (about 2 Tablespoons per serving.).
Sauce may be added to stir -fried vegetables or used as a dipping sauce for chicken or egg rolls.
*Recipe was tested in a 1250 watt microwave oven, adjust cooking time accordingly.

name: Szechuan Style Peanut Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, stir together all ingredients until smooth. May be served at room temperature or chilled.

similar.name: Peanut Dipping Sauce With a Kick

name: Thick Peanut Sauce
directions: Heat oil in non-stick skillet. Saute onion and bell pepper over high heat until softened.
Turn heat down to low. Add tomato, peanut butter, jalapeno, paprika, allspice and thyme. Stir until peanut butter melts and coats vegetables.

similar.name: Spicy Peanut Sauce for Noodles, Veggies And/or Meat

name: Peanut Satay Sauce
directions: Place peanut oil in non-stick saute pan over low heat. Sweat onion 1-2 minutes. Add brown sugar, ketchup, garlic, chili sauce, sesame oil, soy sauce and peanut butter. Stir until peanut butter melts and everything combines.

name: Super Easy Cranberry Sauce
directions: Heat all ingredients over medium to medium-high heat until all berries have burst (be careful, they splatter!), stirring frequently.  If you like a very sweet sauce, stir in some sugar.  This cranberry sauce can be served warm or cold.  Also, it can be made the night before and kept in the fridge until ready to serve.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Spicy Cranberry Relish
directions: Make the fresh cranberry relish according to the directions on the bag of cranberries.  (It's a cup of sugar, a cup of water, and a bag of cranberries, boiled on medium-low heat for ten minutes --  it's so easy to make there's NO excuse for buying that horrid canned stuff!).
Take two cups of the fresh relish and add all remaining ingredients, stirring over medium heat for about 6 or 7 minutes longer.
That's it!  This is delicious served warm, cold, or room temperature, as a relish.  It's particularly good to get a little on your fork to eat with a bite of ham or turkey.

name: Cranberry-Orange Relish
directions: In a medium saucepan, over medium heat, stir together 1/3 cup cold water with cranberries, sugar, and orange peel.  Cook, stirring occasionally, until sugar dissolves.  Increase heat to medium-high and simmer, uncovered, until cranberries pop and mixture begins to thicken, about 8-12 minutes.  Cool completely.  Stir in orange chunks.  Cover and chill at least 8 hours.  Stir in pecans.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: #1 Hot Wing Sauce
directions: Bring wine to a boil.
Add the BBQ Sauce and Franks Red Hot Sauce.
Bring this mixture to a boil.
Once it is at a rolling boil, take off heat, add tobasco, then add butter.
It is easier to add butter in small amounts to help it melt.
Let the butter melt completely and sauce cool down.

name: Autumn-Spiced Cranberry Sauce
directions: HEAT shortening in medium saucepan over medium heat. Add onions; sauté about 2 minutes or until slightly softened.
ADD cranberry sauce, apple butter and cloves. Reduce heat. Simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in orange peel. Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Traditional Applesauce (Or Pear Sauce)
directions: Place the apple chunks in a large, heavy-bottomed, stainless-steel pot. Add the rest of the ingredients.
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally. Simmer until the fruit becomes tender, about 20 minutes.
Puree in a food mill or blender.
Cool and refrigerate.

name: Simple Classic Ketchup
directions: Mix together in a bowl, I prefer to use a whisk. If you are using a spoon, stir after each addition for the first four ingredients.
Pour into a quart jar (a canner funnel helps for this) and put in the fridge!

name: Pear Cranberry Sauce
directions: Peel pears and grate using the largest grating holes. Add to large saucepan with remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and let simmer for 30 minutes. Make sure to stir throughout to avoid burning or sticking to the bottom of the pan.
Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Cocktail Sauce That Will Make People Wonder Why It's Sooo Good!!
directions: Mix all your ingredients together-.
Adjust flavors as you go, adding more or less as you like.
Chill, covered until used.
Enjoy!

name: Blueberry-Cranberry Sauce
directions: Remove all the discolored/white cranberries and discard, then rinse the cranberries and blueberries separately under cold water.
Place the cranberries into a medium saucepan with the orange juice and sugar; bring to a boil over medium heat stirring.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer uncovered for about 10 minutes or until the cranberries pop.
Using a potato masher or the back of a large spoon slightly mash the berries just to make certain all the skins are broken.
Mix in the allspice, nutmeg and cinnamon starting with 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon and add in more to taste; mix until completely combined (about 1 minute) adjust the spices if needed.
Turn off the heat element and mix in the blueberries.
Using a potato masher or spoon mash only a few berries.
Remove from heat; cool slightly.
Transfer to a bowl and refrigerate until thickened (the sauce will thicken as it cools).

name: Quick and Easy Honey Garlic Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan melt butter over medium heat.
Add in garlic and cayenne; cook stirring for about 2 minutes or until the garlic is softened (be careful not to burn the garlic).
Add in the ketchup, honey and soy sauce; bring to a simmer stirring constanly.
Simmer for about 4-5 minutes.

name: Homemade BBQ Sauce
directions: Stir everything together in a small sauce pan.  Simmer on low while stirring for about five minutes, so the flavors can blend and the alcohol can boil off the scotch.  Let cool for five minutes before serving.

name: Easy Cheese Sauce
directions: Blend the water and dry milk powder briefly to mix.
Simmer on medium, stirring constantly, add the cheese, broken into pieces.
Stir until incorporated, salt to taste.
Remove from heat and use immediately, or store in fridge for later.

name: Applesauce
directions: In large saucepan, combine apples and water.
Bring to a boil and cover.
Simmer over low heat for 15 to 20 minutes  or until tender, stirring occasionally.
Stir in cinnamon and sugar and cook until thoroughly heated.

name: Pantry Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well.

name: Orange Peel Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Use as a marinade and basting sauce for pork, chicken or beef.

name: Avocado and Tomato Salsa (Great With Fish or Chicken)
directions: Cut the avocado lengthwise, remove stone (pit).
Cube the avocado into 3/4 inch cubes.  To do this take one half of avocado in the skin and gently cut through the length of the avocado but not through the skin, then do the same through the width.
Take a spoon and scoop out the flesh.
Squeeze the juice of 1 lime over avocado to prevent browning.
Cut tomatoes in half and add to mix.
Chop cilantro, I prefer it to be a rough chop.
Season with salt to taste and toss gently.
Serve over chicken or fish (preferably grilled fish).

name: Salsa Cruda / Pico De Gallo
directions: Core the tomatoes and squeeze the seeds out, chop finely.
Mix all ingredients togethether.
Let sit for 15 min for flavours to mix.
Season with salt.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Avocado and Tomato Salsa (Great With Fish or Chicken)

name: Smoky BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together and either use to baste or as a dipping sauce.

name: The Best Cocktail Sauce Ever
directions: Mix all of the ingredients.
Chill at least one hour and stir  before serving.

name: Smoky Remoulade Sauce
directions: Whisk together all ingredients until blended.
Cover and chill 2 hours before serving.  May be stored in an airtight container in refrigerator up to 3 days.

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan combine the brown sugar and cornstarch.
Add remaining ingredients and cook stirring until thickened and bubbly.
Once the mixture is bubbly, cook for 2 more minutes (continue stirring).  Mixture will thicken.

name: The Boss BBQ Sauce
directions: Put a pot on the stove and put it over a low heat. Slowly add the ingredients in order that I listed except the French's mustard. Allow the sauce to heat evenly in the pot and stir very well before taste.
Different brands of ingredients have different taste so try to avoid generic. If the sauce is too sweet for your taste you can cut the sweetness with French's mustard, soy sauce, and liquid smoke.

If the sauce is not sweet enough you can add molases or brown sugar. BE CAREFUL! A lot goes a long way. So add a little, stir well, and retaste. Please do not burn your tongue. If you have killed your taste buds tasting it is always wise to bring someone else in to taste to make sure you are doing well.
This is a great sauce and will stay good in your fridge for months and months. If you and your family don't eat it all up first.

name: Peppery Mustard Sauce
directions: Whisk all together.

name: Simple Peanut Sauce
directions: Combine everything except the peanut butter in a small saucepan.
Bring to a boil over medium high heat while stirring constantly.
Boil 1 minute or until sugar dissolves.
Stir in peanut butter until smooth.
Allow sauce to cool to room temperature.

similar.name: Spicy Peanut Sauce for Noodles, Veggies And/or Meat

name: French Salad Dressing
directions: Put all ingredients in a medium sized bowl, mix with a wisk until well combined. Store covered in the refrigerator.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce

name: Light Tomato-Based Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all the ingredients and slowly bring to a simmer until sugar is dissolved.
Stir frequently.
Let cool.

name: Carolina Mustard Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all the ingredients and slowly bring to a simmer. Simmer on low heat (using a heat diffuser if you have one or a heavy bottomed non reactive pot) until the sugar is fully dissolved.
Keep a close eye as this sauce can scorch very easily.
Stir frequently.
Let cool.

name: Heavy Tomato-Based Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine the ketchup, cider vinegar, Worcestershire and water. Bring to a simmer to assist in dissolving the sugars. Combine the remaining ingredients and add to the mixture.
Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes over low heat.
Let cool and hold for service at room temperature. Or, the sauce can be stored in an airtight container and refrigerated to use later.

name: Classic Shrimp Cocktail Sauce
directions: Add ketchup, light chili powder, cayenne pepper, prepared horseradish, fresh squeezed lemon juice, and the minced garlic clove.
Vigorously mix ingredients with a large wooden spoon until your sauce is even and consistent.
Transfer to a dipping bowl and serve immediately or let chill for atleast an hour.
Chilling blends and sharpens the flavors and may make sauce spicier.

name: Cranberry Salsa
directions: Using a food processor, chop the cranberries coarsely.
Toward the end processing, add the chopped onion and chop.
Simmer everything together for 10 minutes.  Do not overcook to retain good texture.
If desired, chill the salsa down.

name: Country Barbecue Baste
directions: Stir all ingredients in a small saucepan, until sugar dissolves.
Use to baste meat or poultry while barbecuing.

name: White Horseradish Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl, whisking well.

name: Barbecue Sauce (Red)
directions: Saute the onions, peppers, and crushed red pepper in the canola oil or butter over medium heat until lightly browned, 5 to 10 minutes.  Add the garlic and simmer for 5 minutes more.

Add the chili powder, black pepper, brown sugars, honey, and molasses and cook until carmelized.  Add the vinegar, salt water, mustard, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add the ketchup and simmer for 10 minutes.  Let cool before storing.

name: Low-Country Barbecue Sauce (Mustard Based)
directions: Sweat the garlic, green bell pepper, and onions in the vegetable oil over medium heat, just until tender.  Add the crushed red pepper.  Add the brown sugars, honey and molasses and caramelize the mixture.
Add the vinegar and let simmer for about 15 minutes.
Add the mustard, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, water, salt, and black pepper and simmer until reduced by one-fourth.

name: Garlic Butter Cream Sauce
directions: Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat; add whipping cream, and cook 1 minutes, stirring constantly.  Stir in lemon juice and garlic.

name: Super Simple BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a 2-4 cup measuring cup.
Mix well until there is no clumps.

name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine the stock with the soy sauce, sherry, sugar, cornstarch slurry, vinegar and sesame oil. Stir to dissolve the sugar.
In a medium saucepan, heat the peanut oil until shimmering. Add the ginger and crushed red pepper and cook over high heat, stirring, until fragrant and golden.
Add the stock mixture and boil over high heat until thickened and glossy, about 1 minute.

Note/Ideas:  I usually add some garlic and some fresh orange juice instead of all that stock and 1/4 teaspoon of salt - I think this is really nice because it gives you a lot of sauce - I don't like a dry stir fry, especially over rice.

name: Thick and Spicy Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a saucepan over low heat. As soon as the molasses dissolves, the sauce is ready to use.
Store in a covered glass jar or plastic container in the refrigerator.

name: Honey BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil.
Simmer to thicken a little on low heat, 10 - 15 minutes.
Season to taste.
Serve with chicken or pork.

similar.name: Quick and Easy Honey Garlic Sauce

name: Mamaw Betty's Barbecue Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a medium saucepan.
Simmer over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and let cool. Store in refrigerator. (I pour mine into a pint jar.).

name: Thai Peanut Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl.

Note:  You want to adjust the coconut milk according to the consistancy you are looking for.  Just keep adding little by little until desired consistancy is reached.  I like mine to be slightly thin, so I end up adding quite a bit.  If I run out of milk, I just add water.

similar.name: Spicy Peanut Sauce for Noodles, Veggies And/or Meat

name: Slow-Cooker Apple Butter
directions: Combine all ingredients in slow cooker and mix well.
Cook on High for 8 to 10 hours or on Low for 16-20 hours.  Remove cover during final hours of cooking to cook to desired thickness.

name: Easy BBQ Sauce
directions: mix all ingredients well.  will be gritty til it is cooked on whatever you use it on.

name: Stir Fry Sauce
directions: Whisk chicken broth, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch in small bowl until cornstarch dissolves.
Add to tender-crisp vegetables and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Cook until sauce thickens, about 1 minute.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: My Favourite Sauce
directions: Combine the hot sauce, ketchup, and honey in a small bowl.
Can use right away or cover and store in fridge before using.

name: Simply Salsa
directions: Now there are two ways you can make this.
If you like the Chunky raw aspect of salsa well then just dice all the ingredients as you would like then simply mix together well in a large mixing bowl.

If you like it very thin (as you would get it at an authentic mexican restaurant) well then add the tomatoes and onion into a food processor and pulse two or three times, add the garlic, pulse again 1 or 2 times, add the cilantro and lemon juice and pules finally for a couple of second or until as thin as you would like it. Tip though if you let it mingle in the fridge for an hour or so this will greatly inhance the flavors of all the fresh ingredients.

similar.name: Avocado and Tomato Salsa (Great With Fish or Chicken)

name: Asian Peanut Sauce and Dip
directions: Stir together peanut butter, garlic, brown sugar, mayonnaise, soy sauce, and lemon juice until smooth. Refrigerate 2 hours before serving.
Serves 8.

similar.name: Peanut Dipping Sauce With a Kick

name: Lexington, North Carolina BBQ Sauce
directions: Whisk together all ingredients until sugar and salt are dissolved.
Pull pork into thin shreds and toss with half of the sauce. Save the remaining sauce to serve at the table for people who like a little more.
Makes about 2 cups.

name: Conaways Mustard BBQ Sauce 2
directions: Combine all ingredients except soy sauce and butter in a saucepan.simmer 10 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in soy sauce and butter.

Like my other recipe I suggest you take this sauce, put it in a foil pan and smoke this sauce with whatever you are smoking! Make a big batch of this when you are smoking something and next time your kids have a game and you have no time to cook, add this to a pork roast you have cooked in a crockpot all day --  When you add this sauce to your roast your family will think you worked the pit all day for this AMAZING meal! TRUST ME!

name: White BBQ Sauce, Southern Style
directions: Combine all ingredients together and mix well.

name: Fabulously Simple Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix well (I use a small jar) and serve on the side.

similar.name: Best Tasting and Easy Stir Fry Sauce

name: Homemade Ranch Dressing
directions: Mix ingredients and use or store in fridge.

similar.name: Honey Mustard Salad Dressing or Sauce

name: Blueberry Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients in a sauce pan, bring to a boil and then simmer for 10 minutes, stirring often.  Allow to cool and remove cinnamon stick.

name: Peachy Applesauce
directions: Peel and core apples and cut into chunks.
Peel and core peaches, and cut into chunks.
Combine apples, peaches, water, cinnamon, and ginger in a medium saucepan, and place pan over medium heat.
Cook just until liquid begins to boil, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, stir and simmer fruit until soft, adding more water if necessary, for about 10 minutes for a chunky consistency or 15 minutes for a softer consistency.
Stir in sugar to taste-the amount will depend on the variety and sweetness of the apple-and cook briefly to dissolve the sugar.
Mash or blend to desired consistency.
Cool and serve warm or refrigerate.  The applesauce can also be packed into freezer safe containers and frozen.

name: Mustard Sauce
directions: Bring stock to the boil.
Add mustards, simmer gently for 4 minutes.
Carefully whisk in cream, simmer 3 more minutes until thickened.
Serve over chicken.

name: Sarasota's Sweet and Savory Cranberry Relish
directions: Walnuts  --  Add the walnuts to a dry small saute pan on medium to medium high heat.  Toast them until you begin to smell them and they begin to get golden brown.  Keep an eye on them, they don't take long; and stir them often.  Just a couple of minutes is all it takes.

Cranberry Relish  --  In a medium sauce pan, add the butter and bring to medium heat. Add the onion and simmer 2 minutes until slightly tender. Then stir in the cranberries, cranberry juice, water, pinch of salt, maple syrup and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to a simmer (medium low to low) and cook until the cranberries start to pop - it will take 7-10 minutes. Continue to cook as you stir in the walnuts, chives, dijon mustard, pepper and any additional salt to taste. Cook another minute or two and then remove from the heat and cool. It will thicken upon cooling.  This can easily be done in advance.

Serve  --    This is perfect served with my Chicken and Sweet Potato Hash with a Sweet & Savory Cranberry Relish. Warm or cold, I serve it both ways. If I am serving it warm  --  just a minute or so in the microwave will do the trick.  ENJOY!

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Tangy Carolina Barbecue Sauce
directions: mix all together and bring to a boil, stirring frequently.

name: Cranberry-Apple Cider Sauce
directions: In a large saucepan, bring cider to a boil and cook over a medium-high heat until reduced to 1 cup, about 40 minutes.
Combine reduced cider and all the other ingredients in a medium saucepan.  Cook over low heat, stirring until sugar has dissolved.
Simmer sauce until thickened and cranberries have popped, stirring occasionally, 10-12 minutes.  Sauce will thicken more when cooled.

similar.name: Cranberry Sauce With Dried Cherries and Cloves

name: Cranberry Sauce
directions: Wash cranberries and set aside.
Bring sugar and water to a boil.
Add cranberries, oranges, and cloves.
Simmer over a high flame, stirring frequently until berries pop.
Add crushed pineapple, walnuts, and cinnamon, and blend.
Cool and serve.

name: Easy and Delicious Salsa
directions: Heat jalapenos in a large iron skillet on medium-high heat until skin is semi blackened. Set jalapeno's to the side and cut off stems and slice each jalapeno in half.
Add the onion slices to the iron skillet and cook for about one-two minutes or until browned and flip slices to brown the other side.
In a large blender add 1 can of drained diced tomatoes, half of the jalapeno's, and half of the onion slices. (if you are using fresh garlic, add half of the minced garlic to blender).
